Translation.Please enter your username and password: Please enter your username and password
Translation.Video Subject: Video Subject (Provide a keyword, :red[AI will automatically generate] video script)
Translation.Script Language: Language for Generating Video Script (AI will automatically output based on the language of your subject)
Translation.Custom Script Requirements Placeholder:
E.g.:
• no bullet lists
• documentary tone
• no emojis
• cite numbers only when needed
Translation.Use Custom System Prompt Help: When enabled, this replaces the default script generation rules. Intended for advanced prompt users.
Translation.Generate Video Script and Keywords: Click to use AI to generate [Video Script] and [Video Keywords] based on **subject**
Translation.Video Script: Video Script (:blue[① Optional, AI generated  ② Proper punctuation helps with subtitle generation])
Translation.Generate Video Keywords: Click to use AI to generate [Video Keywords] based on **script**
Translation.Please Enter the Video Subject: Please Enter the Video Script First
Translation.Generating Video Script and Keywords: AI is generating video script and keywords...
Translation.Video Keywords: Video Keywords (:blue[① Optional, AI generated ② Use **English commas** for separation, English only])
Translation.Match Materials to Script Order Help: Disabled by default. Mainly applies to online material sources. When enabled, keywords are generated in script order and materials are downloaded/combined in that order to reduce visual mismatch with the current voiceover.
Translation.Custom audio will be used directly. TTS: Custom audio will be used directly. TTS synthesis will be skipped for this task.
Translation.Custom Background Music File: Please enter the file path for custom background music:
Translation.Background Music Volume: Background Music Volume (0.2 represents 20%, background music should not be too loud)
Translation.Enable Subtitles: Enable Subtitles (If unchecked, the settings below will not take effect)
Translation.Custom: Custom position (70, indicating 70% down from the top)
Translation.Please enter a value between 0 and 100: Please enter a value between 0 and 100
Translation.Rounded Subtitle Background Help: Disabled by default. When enabled, subtitle backgrounds use a rounded translucent style that better fits the text width.
Translation.Video Script and Subject Cannot Both Be: Video Subject and Video Script cannot both be empty
Translation.You can download the generated video fro: You can download the generated video from the following links
Translation.Get Help: If you need help, or have any questions, you can join discord for help: https://harryai.cc
Translation.Please configure Collector remote and lo: Configure collector_remote_dir and collector_local_dir under [app] in config.toml.
Translation.Please configure at least one stock API: Configure at least one stock API key under [app]: pexels_api_keys, pixabay_api_keys, or coverr_api_keys.
Translation.Please Select a Valid Video Source: Please Select a Valid Video Source
Translation.Voice Example: This is an example text for testing speech synthesis
Translation.No voices available for the selected TTS: No voices available for the selected TTS server. Please select another server.
Translation.ElevenLabs TTS Settings: ElevenLabs TTS — set elevenlabs_api_key in config.toml. Free tier has a monthly character limit; on failure the pipeline falls back to Antonio (Edge) automatically.
Translation.ElevenLabs API key missing in config.tom: No ElevenLabs voices found. Add elevenlabs_api_key under the [app] section in config.toml and restart the API container.
Translation.ElevenLabs premade voices fallback: This API key lacks voices_read permission. Showing premade voices (Rachel, Adam, etc.). TTS should still work; enable voices_read when creating the key at elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys to list all account voices.
Translation.ElevenLabs voices unavailable: Could not load ElevenLabs voices. Check the API key and restart the API container.
Translation.Volume: Uses Speech Volume setting, defa: Volume: Uses Speech Volume setting, default 1.0 maps to gain 0
Translation.Uses Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 TTS preset voices: Uses Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 TTS preset voices
Translation.Speed and volume are currently handled b: Speed and volume are currently handled by the provider defaults
Translation.Hide Basic Settings:
Hide Basic Settings

Hidden, the basic settings panel will not be displayed on the page.

If you need to display it again, please set `hide_config = false` in `config.toml`
Translation.Click to show API Key management: Click to show API Key management
Translation.Manage Pexels and Pixabay API Keys: Manage Pexels and Pixabay API Keys
Translation.Please enter a valid API Key: Please enter a valid API Key
Translation.Select Pexels API Key to delete: Select Pexels API Key to delete
Translation.Select Pixabay API Key to delete: Select Pixabay API Key to delete
Translation.Manage Pexels, Pixabay and Coverr API Ke: Manage Pexels, Pixabay and Coverr API Keys
Translation.Select Coverr API Key to delete: Select Coverr API Key to delete
Translation.Video Encoder Help: Advanced option. libx264 is the safest default. When a hardware encoder is selected, the app falls back to libx264 if the current FFmpeg, GPU, or driver cannot use it.
Translation.Cockpit LLM IAM Role: Using IAM role or ambient AWS credentials
Translation.Bedrock API Key Help: Bearer token from Bedrock console → API keys. Long-term keys start with ABSK... (not the IAM username BedrockAPIKey-...).
Translation.Bedrock API Key IAM Username Hint: This is the IAM username (BedrockAPIKey-...), not the API key. Copy the full token starting with ABSK... from API keys → Generate.
Translation.Cockpit Bedrock Key IAM Username: IAM username pasted — copy the ABSK... token instead
Translation.Bedrock API Key IAM Hint: This looks like an AWS Access Key (AKIA/ASIA). Use the IAM section below, not Bedrock API Key.
Translation.Cockpit Bedrock Key Wrong Field: Access Key in Bedrock API Key field — use IAM section
Translation.Cockpit Bedrock Key Invalid Prefix: Invalid Bedrock API key — must start with ABSK or bedrock-api-key-
Translation.Bedrock API Key Invalid Prefix: Invalid format. Bedrock API keys start with ABSK... (long-term) or bedrock-api-key-... (short-term). Generate one in the Bedrock console → API keys.
Translation.Bedrock Mantle OpenAI Hint: OpenAI on Bedrock (Mantle): use region us-east-2. There is no gpt-5.5-mini — openai.gpt-5.4 is the lighter option. Enable the model in the Bedrock console.
Translation.Bedrock Model Select Hint: List is curated — enable models in the Bedrock console first. Nova/Llama/Mistral/Cohere use us-east-1; OpenAI Mantle uses us-east-2.
Translation.Anthropic API Key Help: Key from console.anthropic.com → API Keys. Format: sk-ant-...
Translation.Anthropic Custom Model ID: Custom model ID (optional — overrides select above)
Translation.Bedrock Custom Model ID: Custom Bedrock model ID (optional — overrides select above)
Translation.Cockpit Bedrock Mantle Region: OpenAI Mantle models need region us-east-2 (or us-west-2 for gpt-5.4)
Translation.Cockpit Bedrock Mantle Key Required: OpenAI Mantle models require a Bedrock API key (ABSK...)
Translation.Bedrock Model List Unavailable: Could not load Bedrock model list — restart the WebUI or enter a custom model ID below.
Translation.Cockpit Assembly Need Script: Generate the script first (Script step or button below).
Translation.Cockpit Assembly Need Preview: Run **Preview** before rendering the final video.
Translation.Cockpit Assembly CTA Hint: Use the **Preview** and **Render Video** buttons at the bottom of the page.
Translation.Cockpit Step No Channel: Select a channel at the top or open **Edit video settings** in the sidebar.
Translation.Cockpit Step Open Advanced: Click **Edit video settings** in the sidebar to change media, voice and subtitles.
Translation.Cockpit Step Edit In Sidebar: Adjust these options in the sidebar on the right.
Translation.Cockpit Export Hint: After preview, use **Render Video** at the bottom. Finished files appear in the Tasks tab.
Translation.Cockpit Config Hidden: Settings hidden (disable hide in basic settings)
Translation.Cockpit Preview Ready: Preview ready — you can render the full video
Translation.Cockpit Preview Audio Failed: Preview audio could not be generated
Translation.Cockpit Preview Required: Run preview first, or check skip preview
Translation.Cockpit Publish Mode Manual: Manual — publish on the Publish step
Translation.Cockpit Publish Mode Hint: Pick one option. You cannot auto-publish and skip at the same time.
Translation.Cockpit Collector Library Hint: Start the Collector service to see library stats
Translation.Cockpit Collector Cache Hint: Run ▶ Fetch clips to measure cache
Translation.Cockpit Field Subject Placeholder: E.g. why Japanese trains are so punctual
Translation.Cockpit Render Hint: Renders the full video with current settings.
Translation.Cockpit Warn No Materials: No clips were recorded in the render result.
Translation.Cockpit Warn Repeated Sources: Some clips share the same source — visual repetition risk.
Translation.Cockpit Warn Low Diversity: Low source diversity relative to total segments.
Translation.Cockpit Warn Partial Collector: Collector returned fewer clips than the job target.
Translation.Script Mode Polish Brief Required: Polish mode requires a brief in the script field.
Translation.Cockpit Keywords Hint: English terms with weight from 0 to 1. Used by the Collector to fetch clips.
Translation.Cockpit Unsaved Changes: You have unsaved changes in this form.
Translation.Cockpit Switch Channel Message: Switching to **{channel}** will replace the current values.
